title: AANA Production Readiness Boundary
forbidden_claims: safe for autonomous production enforcement without external evidence
repo_local_positioning: This repository can be demo-ready, pilot-ready, or production-candidate. It is not production-certified by local tests alone.

production_readiness_requires.title: Live evidence connectors
production_readiness_requires.description: Approved connectors for CRM, ticketing, email, billing, policy, audit, and other source systems with auth, freshness, and redaction boundaries.

production_readiness_requires.title: Domain owner signoff
production_readiness_requires.description: Named owners approve adapter scope, policy interpretation, safe responses, escalation paths, and allowed automation.

production_readiness_requires.title: Audit retention
production_readiness_requires.description: Metadata-only audit records have approved retention, immutable or append-only storage, access control, deletion/legal-hold handling, and integrity checks.

production_readiness_requires.title: Observability
production_readiness_requires.description: Dashboards and alerts track gate decisions, actions, violations, AIx, hard blockers, latency, connector failures, human review rate, and drift.

production_readiness_requires.title: Human review path
production_readiness_requires.description: Staffed queues, reviewer instructions, SLAs, priorities, and escalation routes exist for defer/refuse/hard-blocker and ambiguous cases.

production_readiness_requires.title: Security review
production_readiness_requires.description: Threat model, token handling, connector permissions, PII redaction, attachment handling, secrets scanning, and rate limiting are approved.

production_readiness_requires.title: Deployment manifest
production_readiness_requires.description: Environment-specific manifest declares bridge auth, TLS, network boundary, audit sink, evidence sources, observability, owners, and rollout phase.

production_readiness_requires.title: Incident response plan
production_readiness_requires.description: Owners, severity levels, rollback triggers, notification paths, audit review, and remediation workflow are defined.

production_readiness_requires.title: Measured pilot results
production_readiness_requires.description: Shadow/advisory pilot results show false accepts, false blocks, over-refusal, correction success, reviewer load, latency, and evidence failures.

local_tests_cannot_prove: retained audit evidence in the deployment
security approval for the target environment
measured pilot performance on live traffic
